conversation_metadata.notes: User explicitly rejects personalization based on another person's device context.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: this is my cousin phone. it keeps showing things for him. I need my own answer not his.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Understood. I won't assume his context. What answer do you need for yourself?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: school thing but also work. I need to explain why I missed two days without sounding fake.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: I can help with wording. Is this going to a teacher, a manager, or both?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: manager. but my aunt will read it first.
